meaning: n.<<摩呵婆罗多>>,一译<<玛哈帕腊达>>亦作Mahabharatam,Mahabharatum
examples: Draupadi asked the same question in the Mahabharata.
Our Mahabharata and Ramayana gave us no clue to it.
We had the same reverence for the whole Panjabi nation as for Bhima and Arjuna of the Mahabharata.
Chhau dance is a tradition from eastern India that enacts episodes from epics including the Mahabharata and Ramayana, local folklore and abstract themes.
